rows.label: qev065404_MSG0001
rows.name: You...? Why are you here...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Oh well. Take a look at this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0003
rows.name: It's Clemons's corpse. ...The real one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0004
rows.name:
A week has passed since he died. He was
most likely killed by the Definian who
tried to trap us in their scheme.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_JNK0010
rows.name: Consider

rows.label: qev065404_SEL0011
rows.name: Think about the time of Clemons's death.

rows.label: qev065404_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev065404_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask how the search for
the Definian is going.

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0005
rows.name:
What? Do you have doubts about
the time of Clemons's death?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0006
rows.name:
There is absolutely no mistake that over
a week has passed since his death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0007
rows.name:
At the very least, it's highly unlikely
that he died yesterday or today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0008
rows.name:
Unfortunately, we still haven't been
able to secure the fleeing Definian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0009
rows.name:
We have completely sealed off the exits regardless of
whether they are ordinary citizens or government officials,
so the only certainty is that they are still inside NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0010
rows.name:
What's wrong? Suddenly
getting lost in thought...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0011
rows.name: Does something come to mind?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_JNK0030
rows.name: Testify

rows.label: qev065404_SEL0031
rows.name: Say that you saw the fleeing enemy.

rows.label: qev065404_JNK0040
rows.name: Deliberate

rows.label: qev065404_SEL0041
rows.name: Gather your thoughts.

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0012
rows.name: You saw the enemy, you say!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0013
rows.name: Then why didn't you catch them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0014
rows.name:
You're thinking about this
for quite a long time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0015
rows.name:
Don't just think about it alone. If you
report exactly what you saw, we could
pool our wisdom together, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Eh? You met Clemons
just a little while ago?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0017
rows.name:
That means... You met the
Definian............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0018
rows.name:
I see... The enemy disguised
themselves as Clemons again and
duped you before you found this corpse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0019
rows.name:
Kuh............! Time and time again...
they keep getting the better of us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0020
rows.name:
We'll find them immediately
and............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Oh, an emergency contact
email... Wait, what is this...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0022
rows.name:
Suriella and Clemons are
fighting outside the city...!?
Could that Clemons be...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hey, I'm going to go get my equipment
ready! You head ahead to the small
island on the west side of NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0023
rows.name:
The place where Suriella and
Clemons are fighting is the small
island on the west side of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0024
rows.name:
The combat capability of a Definian is an
unknown variable, after all. I'm going to get
my equipment properly ready before going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0025
rows.name: You head on ahead of me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065404_MSG0026
rows.name:
Absolutely do not let them escape!
Let's end this incident—right there![ST:wait ]
